name: 主僕變知己（忠僕線）
description: Mark從單純的助手發展為Tristan最信任的人，參與情報收集和計劃執行，是男主身邊不可或缺的支撐。

examples.drama_title: love drama "I was tricked into marrying a blind CEO I didn't know" HD FULL, CEO,ENGSUB,  Episodes
examples.excerpt: Miss Green, I should be thanking you instead. Tristan hasn't smiled ever since his accident. / Don't worry, boss. I didn't see anything. I know you saw everything, Mark. How do you know? Because I can see.
examples.context: Mark從單純的助手發展為Tristan最信任的人，參與情報收集和計劃執行，是男主身邊不可或缺的支撐。
